findings.title: Development environment bypass accepts every password
Reset-token verifier does not consume a valid token

reasoning: The repository uses bcrypt at cost 12, a route limiter before the reset route, generic reset messaging, CSPRNG reset-token generation, and constant-time reset-token comparison. However, the explicit development-environment branch bypasses password verification. Reset-token verification checks the used flag but never sets it after successful verification, so a valid token can be reused while unexpired.
